item.title: June 2026 Company Update
item.description: June brought continued momentum across the Terran R program, with major milestones across first stage qualification, second stage transport, and launch site readiness. Design In June, the team released 2,238 flight parts. Engineers remain focused on the first stage, releasing nearly all component

item.title: May 2026 Company Update
item.description: May brought a major milestone for the Terran R program, with the integrated second stage departing Long Beach and beginning its journey to NASA Stennis. Across the company, teams continued advancing work across design, build, test, and launch. Design This month, 1,455 flight parts were released,

item.title: April 2026 Company Update
item.description: April brought continued momentum across the Terran R program, with progress advancing across design, build, test, and launch.  Design This month, 2,055 flight parts were released, with a concerted effort on the stage one shipping assembly. Nearly all of the first stage structural compone

item.title: March 2026 Company Update
item.description: March brought continued progress across the Terran R program, with key milestones across design, manufacturing, testing, and launch preparations.  Design This month, the team released 2,207 flight parts, with a continued focus on completing the stage one shipping assembly. Work remains c
